name: Spam Skillet Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
1 can No-salt-added green beans, drained (16 oz)
1 can No-salt-added whole tomatoes, drained and chopped (16 oz)
1 can No-salt-added vegetable juice cocktail (5.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling water 3 minutes or until crisp-tender.
2. Drain. In a skillet, cook SPAM until browned; remove from the skillet.
3. Add carrots to the skillet and saute for 4-5 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add onion, celery, and garlic; saute until vegetables are tender.
5. Combine flour, pepper, and thyme. Stir the flour mixture into the vegetable mixture; cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
6. Add SPAM, green beans, tomato, and vegetable juice cocktail. Bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Remove skillet from heat. Arrange potato slices over the SPAM mixture to cover completely.
9. Spray potato slices with vegetable cooking spray.
10. Broil 6 inches from the heat source for 10 minutes or until golden.
